statusDefinitions.covered: Legacy journey is implemented in Playwright and passing or ready to run in CI.
statusDefinitions.partial: Legacy journey has Playwright coverage, but scenario or assertion gaps remain.
statusDefinitions.port: Legacy journey is still required and planned for Playwright implementation.
statusDefinitions.obsolete: Legacy journey is intentionally retired because the workflow or diagnostic value no longer applies.
statusDefinitions.out-of-scope: Legacy journey is owned by another repo, suite, or release gate.

entries.journey: Legacy accessibility smoke coverage
entries.evidence: EXUI-4688 owns the a11y release gate and threshold evidence.
entries.notes: Keep as sign-off evidence rather than one-for-one legacy a11y test ports.

entries.journey: Share case selected-case, add/remove user, confirmation, and completion flows
entries.evidence: EXUI-4685 implementation branch seeded; executable tests still pending.
entries.notes: Highest-value functional parity gap.

entries.journey: Case list checkbox selection persistence across navigation, filters, pagination, sorting, and share-case handoff
entries.evidence: EXUI-4685 implementation branch seeded; executable tests still pending.
entries.notes: Implement with shared case-list mocks and direct share-case routing assertions.

entries.journey: Media Viewer redaction, bookmark, and comment tools
entries.evidence: Happy-path document opening exists; tool-level coverage is still pending.
entries.notes: Add tool assertions only after confirming stable media-viewer locators and safe document fixtures.

entries.journey: Create-case service and CCD toolkit journey breadth
entries.evidence: Core create-case coverage exists; Probate, Financial Remedy, IA, and FPL ownership needs an explicit port/retire decision.
entries.notes: Do not block EXUI-4685 on this P2 breadth decision.

entries.journey: CCD retain_hidden_field submit payload behaviour
entries.evidence: Create-case field coverage exists, but EXUI-4317 hidden-field parity remains open.
entries.notes: Treat EXUI-4317 as the dependency for closure.

entries.journey: CCD collection allowInsert/allowDelete display context matrix
entries.evidence: No complete Playwright matrix found.
entries.notes: Can be added after share-case because it is isolated to create-case mocks.

entries.journey: Case flags create/manage/support flows
entries.evidence: Current E2E coverage exists; scenario-level parity requires separate case-flags review.
entries.notes: Not part of the immediate P1 share-case closure.

entries.journey: Search case and global search flows
entries.evidence: E2E, integration, and API coverage exists.
entries.notes: Only revisit if scenario-level review finds missing assertions.

entries.journey: Work allocation, manage tasks, work filters, case task tabs, and role actions
entries.evidence: Extensive manage-tasks and work-allocation coverage exists in Playwright.
entries.notes: Keep under evidence review, not a current P1 gap.

entries.journey: Specific access request, challenged access request, and restricted case access
entries.evidence: Positive and negative Playwright integration coverage exists with direct unit coverage.
entries.notes: No immediate migration action.

entries.journey: Case file view and document sorting
entries.evidence: E2E and integration coverage exists.
entries.notes: No immediate migration action.

entries.journey: Judicial booking and work access booking UI
entries.evidence: Positive and negative booking UI coverage exists.
entries.notes: No immediate migration action.

entries.journey: Base case-list rendering, filters, pagination, optional fields, and a11y smoke
entries.evidence: Core case-list coverage exists; a11y evidence is owned by EXUI-4688.
entries.notes: Selection-specific parity is tracked separately under P1.

entries.journey: Header tabs, cookie banner, footer pages, timestamp, and shell navigation
entries.evidence: Smoke coverage exists but no explicit shell contract parity was found.
entries.notes: Can be implemented as a small shell/navigation integration slice after P1 work.

entries.journey: LaunchDarkly feature-toggle contract and activity tracking
entries.evidence: No direct Playwright target found in the parity scan.
entries.notes: Needs a layer decision before implementation.

entries.journey: Probate refunds and EXUI versus CCD UI comparison checks
entries.evidence: No direct Playwright target found in the parity scan.
entries.notes: Requires ownership decision; likely not a blocker for Codecept retirement if product accepts waiver.

entries.journey: Evidence manager API contract
entries.evidence: Playwright API coverage exists.
entries.notes: No immediate migration action.

entries.journey: Legacy smoke journey
entries.evidence: Playwright E2E smoke coverage exists.
entries.notes: No immediate migration action.

entries.journey: Debug mock browser diagnostic feature
entries.evidence: Debug-only legacy diagnostic flow; not required for Playwright parity.
entries.notes: Keep retired unless a maintainer identifies current diagnostic value.
